name: termbeam
description: Beam your terminal to any device — mobile-optimized web terminal with multi-session support

scripts.test: node -e "const{execFileSync:r}=require('child_process'),{readdirSync:d,statSync:s}=require('fs'),{join:j}=require('path');function f(p){let a=[];for(const e of d(p)){const c=j(p,e);s(c).isDirectory()?a.push(...f(c)):e.endsWith('.test.js')&&!e.startsWith('e2e-')&&e!=='devtunnel-install.test.js'&&a.push(c)}return a}r(process.execPath,['--test','--test-timeout=60000',...f('test')],{stdio:'inherit'})"
scripts.test:coverage: c8 --exclude=src/tunnel/ --exclude=test --reporter=text --reporter=lcov --reporter=json-summary --reporter=json node -e "const{execFileSync:r}=require('child_process'),{readdirSync:d,statSync:s}=require('fs'),{join:j}=require('path');function f(p){let a=[];for(const e of d(p)){const c=j(p,e);s(c).isDirectory()?a.push(...f(c)):e.endsWith('.test.js')&&!e.startsWith('e2e-')&&e!=='devtunnel-install.test.js'&&a.push(c)}return a}r(process.execPath,['--test','--test-timeout=60000','--test-reporter=spec','--test-reporter-destination=stdout',...f('test')],{stdio:'inherit'})"
scripts.lint: node --check src/server/*.js src/cli/*.js src/tunnel/*.js src/utils/*.js bin/*.js
scripts.build:frontend: cd src/frontend && npm ci && npm run build

author: Dor Lugasi <dorlugasigal@gmail.com>
